scripts.build: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.build:packages: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid
scripts.build:docs: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs
scripts.build:playground: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.dev:docs: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run dev --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-docs
scripts.dev:playground: npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-core && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-components && npm run build --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid && npm run dev --workspace @vyrnforge/ui-data-grid-basic-playground
scripts.quality: npm run typecheck && npm run test && npm run build && npm run build:docs
